column1: # Goal: expand sewage gold coverage toward 60 independently curated entries.
# Fill term/readings manually from human review or authoritative domain sources.
# Do NOT copy readings from Sudachi, UniDic/fugashi, pyopenjtalk, LLM outputs, or any resolver under evaluation.
# Dictionary/TTS/G2P systems are methods being evaluated; using them to fill gold is circular evaluation.
# readings may contain multiple acceptable readings separated by "|"; keep all readings normalized to hiragana.
# source should name the human reviewer or external authority used for curation.
# notes should record uncertainty, abbreviation policy, or source page references.
